dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: You probably have no idea why this is happening to you, but... I have a good reason for it. You... you...

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Wow, Hyun, you still got that fierce look in your eyes.

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: I'm really going to beat the shit out of you this time.

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Hey, Four Eyes!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S FRIEND
dialogue.line: Huh? M-Me???

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Yeah, man, it's your turn now.

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: What's wrong? Have you got too close?

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: This little shit is your best friend now?

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Well, they were all his friends too. All friends with this douchebag.

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: Don't do it if you don't feel like it. I'm not going to force you, okay?

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: By the way, who do you hang out with?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN'S FRIEND
dialogue.line: Sorry.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Damn it. Still don't know my place...

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I know I'm not a hero myself.

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Damn, the elevator's not working again. One damn thing after another!

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What the hell are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Sorry?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Did Mr. Kim send you? I've said this over and over but I'll say it again, I don't work with thugs.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Uh, what? No!

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Haha, I'm just fooling around. You're that new kid from Apartment 1410, right?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What's that for? Has someone tried to rob you?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: No, this is just...

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Blood stains?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What the fuck is this?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Well, well... what happened was... it's not what you think.

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What the hell did you do?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Huh? Well, it was...

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Quit mumbling and speak up!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Have you seen a monster?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Yes, a mon... monster. I saw it headed for the stairways. I mean, have you not seen it?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: A monster??

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Yes, that thing. It looked just like the girl next door.

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Are you goddamn kidding me?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: What the...?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: I haven't even hit you yet.

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: RESIDENT WOMAN
dialogue.line: Hey, Apartment 1410. Hey! You! Hey! Hey!

dialogue.speaker: INNER HYUN
dialogue.line: Hey, Hyun. I won't tell anyone. So, I hope you could be a little bit more honest with me.

dialogue.speaker: INNER HYUN
dialogue.line: I'm another you that exists within yourself. You and I are the same but different, and different but also the same.

dialogue.speaker: INNER HYUN
dialogue.line: One thing that is for sure is, I'm on your side.

dialogue.speaker: INNER HYUN
dialogue.line: So, please tell me. What is it you want?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: That was one hell of a dream.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Ahh...

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: What the...?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Did they all go on a strike together? This is ridiculous.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: No games. What am I going to do now?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: The internet's working though. But why is it so slow? Huh?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Aww.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Eighteen-year-old high school student Hyun Cha lost all his family. Here, alone, at the end of the world.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: It wasn't a dream?

summary: Hyun is bullied by a monster-like figure, then encounters a resident woman who questions him about bloodstains. He tries to explain he saw a monster, but she dismisses him. Later, Hyun has a dream-like conversation with his inner self, who claims to be on his side. Waking up, he finds the internet is slow and news about 'early symptoms of monsterization' is trending, realizing the world is ending and his earlier encounter was real.
